A.subject: AI-powered digital asset play — $250K raise | 35–40% IRR
A.body:
Hi Lukasz,

Given your work at OpenAI and your investments in AI infrastructure, I wanted to share an opportunity at the intersection of AI and cash-flowing digital assets.

Viking Digital Group is raising $250,000–$300,000 to acquire two fully automated YouTube channels (Sports & Mystery niches) generating $192,000+ in combined annual net profit at 85–90% margins. These are AI-assisted faceless channels — scripting, editing, and publishing largely automated via SOP + AI tooling. No single-creator dependency.

Target IRR: 35–40% | Payback: ~2.3 years | Exit: 4–5x at 36 months

Full investor memo available. Happy to connect if this fits your thesis.

— Jonathan Martin
Founder & Managing Partner, Viking Digital Group
jonathan@vikingdigitalgroup.com | vikingdigitalgroup.com

We're raising $250,000–$300,000 to acquire two automated YouTube channels generating $192,000+ in annual net profit at 85–90% gross margins. Recurring ad revenue, AI-assisted operations, no creator dependency. Demonstrated traction — not a startup.
